features_note: England and Wales are kept as SEPARATE features (properties.name = 'England' / 'Wales') so consumers can do per-nation point-in-polygon splits. src.catalogue.build.load_region_geometry unions all features, so the file also works directly as a single England+Wales coverage filter.
simplification_note: No local simplification applied — the ONS BUC product is already ultra-generalised to 500 m, which is ample for a station coverage filter (this is not cartography).
contains_buffer_note: Point-in-region tests in src.catalogue.build apply REGION_CONTAINS_BUFFER_DEG (+0.15 deg, ~15 km) to the polygon. For a national boundary this pulls in a fringe of stations just over the Scottish border and slightly offshore; acceptable for a coverage spike, revisit before production.
boundary_type_note: England + Wales national outlines, used by scripts/national_catalogue_dryrun.py to exercise the catalogue machinery at national scale. The EA Hydrology API covers England (plus some NRW stations); Scotland and Northern Ireland are excluded.
